title: RawExtractionCandidateV1
description: Pre-canonical extraction artifact. Untyped text unit extracted from source material. May be composite. Never typed. Never routed. Never canonicalized.
$comment:
REC_FINGERPRINT (design decision — not contract-specified):
Normalization norm(x): trim → lowercase → collapse whitespace to _ → remove disallowed punctuation → null = empty
Concatenation: REC-1.0 | text_norm
Hash: SHA-256 → lowercase hex
ID format: REC_<sha256hex>

NOTE: sourceReference is NOT a REC field. Per GLOBAL-SPLIT-DOCTRINE.md,
sourceReference is carried by AU, not REC.

NOTE: REC ID format is a design decision. The DETERMINISTIC-GLOBAL-IDENTITY-FRAMEWORK
governs canonical objects only. REC is pre-canonical. Hash-derived IDs chosen
for replay determinism consistency.

id.description: Content-derived ID. REC_<sha256hex> of normalized text content.

text.description: Raw extracted text. May be composite. Unchanged from source. No rewriting.

isComposite.description: True if atomicity enforcement detected multiple ontological components. Composite RECs must produce sibling AUs and a PCR before any seed typing.
